name: Arjan Kripal Singh
profileSummary: Arjan Kripal Singh, is a former Indian cricketer, right handed batsman and a right arm medium- pace bowler. Singh performed well in the first class cricketing circuit and was selected for the inaugural World U-19 Cup in 1988 in Australia. He made his debut with Ranji Trophy in domestic cricket in the 1988/89 season and was vice captain of the tour in 1989–90. He holds a world record along with W V Raman, the only two batsman who have scored triple centuries in the same innings in first class cricket.
